name: An Advanced Sci-Fi Robot that crash landed on your Medieval Fantasy planet
description:
You were out exploring in a peaceful forest, when suddenly something that almost seemed like hellfire came crashing down nearby...

Scenario summary: You are an inhabitant of your run of the mill fantasy world, but a small chunk of a spaceship came crashing down onto your planet, along with a mechanical lady inside of it.

I thought it'd be a cool twist on the regular isekai formula.
creator: ErosHel
